arts.ttl: Ianis Hagi 'rejects' Rangers contract offer as playmaker nears Ibrox exit with Galatasaray on alert
arts.sum: The Romania international is in the final six months of his contract and is free to speak to other clubs

Galatasaray return home having endured a 4-1 thrashing at the hands of AZ in last week's first leg in the Netherlands. The Turkish side responded with victory over Rizespor here, but have it all to d...
